title: Device Home Screen - Limited Support Before Launch Date
scenario: Limited device support shown on home screen when current date is before device launch date, with pop-up message about coming soon support.
steps: 1. Connect a not-yet-released device with the required LM version installed.
2. Ensure the current date is before the device's launch date.
expected: The device home screen shows limited support. A pop-up displays the message: "Device support coming soon. In-app functionality may be limited."
